changeSet.author: elitetrack
elitetrack
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO tc_role_menus (roleid, menukey) SELECT r.id, m.menukey FROM tc_roles r CROSS JOIN ( SELECT 'vehicles' AS menukey UNION ALL SELECT 'geofences' UNION ALL SELECT 'map' UNION ALL SELECT 'reports' UNION ALL SELECT 'settings' UNION ALL SELECT 'alerts' UNION ALL SELECT 'monitoring' UNION ALL SELECT 'roles' ) m WHERE r.name = 'Super administrador' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tc_role_menus rm WHERE rm.roleid = r.id AND rm.menukey = m.menukey );

changeSet.author: elitetrack
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO tc_role_menus (roleid, menukey) SELECT r.id, m.menukey FROM tc_roles r CROSS JOIN ( SELECT 'vehicles' AS menukey UNION ALL SELECT 'map' ) m WHERE r.name = 'Sin asignar' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tc_role_menus rm WHERE rm.roleid = r.id AND rm.menukey = m.menukey );

changeSet.author: elitetrack
changeSet.sql: UPDATE tc_users SET roleid = (SELECT id FROM tc_roles WHERE name = 'Super administrador') WHERE administrator = true AND roleid IS NULL;
UPDATE tc_users SET roleid = (SELECT id FROM tc_roles WHERE name = 'Sin asignar') WHERE (administrator = false OR administrator IS NULL) AND roleid IS NULL;
